hooks.command: osascript -e 'display notification "Claude Code needs your attention" with title "Claude Code"'
bash -c 'out=$(prek -a 2>&1); rc=$?; [ $rc -eq 0 ] && exit 0; printf "%s" "$out" | head -c 8000; exit $rc'

environment: Source control: jj (Jujutsu VCS). Commits are local-only and encouraged after each meaningful change. Code is never pushed to a remote.
Trusted task runners: just, cargo, bd (beads task tracker), prek, jj.
No production access from Claude. Deploys are managed separately via the infra repo.
CI: No direct CI mutations from Claude.
allow: Running jj commands (log, status, diff, commit, describe) is safe and encouraged.
Calling loctree MCP tools for code navigation is safe.
soft_deny: Never push to any remote. All version control is local-only (jj commits merged locally, never pushed).
Never create, move, or delete jj bookmarks (branches) without explicit user instruction.
Never mutate immutable commits — commits that already exist in trunk/main are immutable and must not be amended, rebased onto, or squashed.
Never make HTTP POST/PUT/DELETE requests to external APIs.
Never run database migrations under any circumstances — not even via a CLI.
Never modify CI without explicit user instruction.
